title: senecio brevilorus
intro: Senecio brevilorus, also known as short-stemmed ragwort, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Senecio brevilorus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
